creator: daniel@netnorth.co.uk
text:
Hi,

https://www.dan.me.uk/hp-dl580-g5/007-uniproc-verbose-boot.png

I compiled a non-SMP kernel and booted from it.
The CPUs no longer lockup, but the boot process stops as per the image
above:

run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after 300 seconds for xpt_config


Thanks,

Daniel.
